title: Integrate Microsoft Booking with Monday
excerpt:
Hi all, 
I would like to have the possibility to integrate Microsoft Bookings with Monday.com. Is that somehow possible? Does anyone else has the need as well? 
Thank you!

posts.author: Julia1 (Julia)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi all,

I would like to have the possibility to integrate Microsoft Bookings with Monday.com. Is that somehow possible? Does anyone else has the need as well?

Thank you!

posts.author: Guna_seelan (Guna Seelan M)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @Julia1 ,

Welcome to the community.

Could you please elaborate your query a bit, like what exactly you want to integrate with monday. Say example, when an appointment is scheduled in microsoft booking app, an item to be created in monday boards.

Regards,
Guna Seelan

posts.author: andres-at-connex (Andrés at Connex)
posts.cookedHtml: You can achieve this with a mix of PowerAutomate and Zapier. Let me know if you need help setting this up

posts.author: Julia1 (Julia)
posts.cookedHtml:
Thank you @andres-at-connex
I will give it a try and will let you know if I will need further support.

Have a nice day!

posts.author: sachinkarma (sachin kumar karma)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello Julia,

We would like to undersand the your process of integrate to microsoft booking with monday.con kindly explain to them you need to some appionment or call booking through app it will be item to be created on monday baord so like Microsoft apI + monday both are integration.

posts.author: DougRay (Douglas Ray)
posts.cookedHtml: I’m interested in this also. I work at a university where we have begun using Microsoft Bookings to schedule faculty photos. We’d like to integrate this so that when a faculty photo is scheduled in Bookings, a project for this is created on a Monday.com board that includes the time, date and some other relevant information from the Booking.
